title: oncidium lineoligerum
intro: Oncidium lineoligerum, also known as the 'Hawaiian orchid', is a species of orchid native to Hawaii and the Pacific islands. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oncidium lineoligerum include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the recovery from respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Oncidium lineoligerum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although the plant's availability and usage may vary due to conservation efforts.
